perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are standing in a studio-like room with white walls, holding purple and pink foam pool noodles. They are smiling and pointing at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to close-ups of a skincare product, showing the gel-like texture being pumped onto a hand and massaged into skin. (3) Various body parts (hands, heels, elbows) are shown being treated with a yellow scrub, followed by shots of smooth, glowing skin. (4) The women reappear in a bathroom setting, holding the product bottles, gesturing enthusiastically while talking to each other and the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-energy pop music plays. Two female voices are heard laughing and speaking in an excited, high-pitched tone. (2) The music softens as a steady, professional male voiceover begins explaining the product's ingredients and benefits. (3) Sound effects like 'ding' for emphasis and the mechanical sound of a pump are audible during the product demo. (4) The audio returns to the two women in the bathroom, their voices remain friendly and humorous as they discuss the product.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '大家來找碴' (Let's play spot the lie) appears in a playful font. (2) Functional Text: A menu of three options A, B, and C appears, listing personal trivia. (3) Decorative Text: '158就158' (158 is 158) appears when a height claim is challenged. (4) Functional Text: 'Whitewings 白色翅膀沐浴膜' and '95% 純天然植萃成分' provide product details. (5) Hook Text: '限量500組送' (Limited to 500 sets) appears near the end.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators visible throughout the skit.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long straight black hair and wears a cream-colored zip-up hoodie. The other has dark hair with bangs and wears a white long-sleeved t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a clean studio with beige walls, moves to a brightly lit bathroom with a glass shower door and white tiles.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Demonstration -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To market and endorse White Wings skincare products by using a relatable, humorous skit as a hook to transition into a detailed demonstration of the products' effectiveness and ingredients.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, detailed explanation of its benefits, and a call to action with a discount offer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interaction between the two creators and interactive game-style overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends entertainment with a hard-sell product demonstration, typical of influencer marketing styles.
